subtasks.description: Query budget allocation by product category with cost trends over time (YoY or period-over-period). Include total spend, avg unit cost, volume variance, and growth rates by category.

Reconcile budget trends across categories, identify underutilized vs. high-growth segments, classify spending efficiency (high-ROI, stable, declining), and generate reallocation recommendations with prioritized actions (shift %, target allocation).

plan.cost_rationale: 2 subtasks required: (1) SQL query to extract multi-dimensional budget & cost trend data with aggregations and time-series analysis (mid-tier for multi-table joins and window functions needed for YoY comparison), (2) cross_recon at frontier tier to analyze spending efficiency across categories, classify posture (growth/decline/stable), and synthesize reallocation recommendations with context and trade-offs. The reallocation strategy synthesis is part of cross_recon (classification + recommendation), not a separate policy step, since this is business optimization, not governance compliance.

output.sql: WITH yearly AS (SELECT product, fiscal_year, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, AVG(amount_usd/NULLIF(daily_active_seats,0)) AS avg_unit_cost, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_volume, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2023-01-01' GROUP BY product, fiscal_year), with_prior AS (SELECT product, fiscal_year, total_spend, avg_unit_cost, total_volume, event_count, LAG(total_spend) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year) AS prior_spend, LAG(total_volume) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year) AS prior_volume, LAG(avg_unit_cost) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year) AS prior_unit_cost FROM yearly) SELECT product, fiscal_year, total_spend, avg_unit_cost, total_volume, event_count, prior_spend, CASE WHEN prior_spend > 0 THEN ROUND(((total_spend - prior_spend)/prior_spend)*100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS spend_yoy_growth_pct, CASE WHEN prior_volume > 0 THEN ROUND(((total_volume - prior_volume)::NUMERIC/prior_volume)*100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS volume_yoy_growth_pct, CASE WHEN prior_unit_cost > 0 THEN ROUND(((avg_unit_cost - prior_unit_cost)/prior_unit_cost)*100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS unit_cost_yoy_growth_pct FROM with_prior ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, total_spend DESC

reconciled.sql_value: yearly product budget trends with YoY spend, volume, and unit cost growth
